title: Scenario

scenario_id.description: Unique identifier for this scenario. Non-null on any Run produced by scenario execution.

case_id.description: The case this scenario belongs to. Must match the case_id on the baseline Run.

baseline_run_id.description: run_id of the Run used as the baseline for this scenario. The scenario engine diffs its output Run against this baseline.

change_set.description: Ordered list of variable injections applied to the baseline before re-execution. An empty array denotes a baseline scenario (no changes applied).

oneOf.description: Sentinel value indicating this is a baseline scenario with no change_set applied.
Structured diff entries produced after scenario execution, one per affected issue.

diff_summary.description: Either the literal string 'baseline' (for baseline scenarios) or a structured array of per-issue impact entries produced after execution.

affected_issue_ids.description: Issue object_ids whose analysis changed as a result of the change_set. Empty for baseline scenarios.

affected_evidence_ids.description: Evidence object_ids referenced or mutated by the change_set. Empty for baseline scenarios.

change_item.description: A single variable injection: records one field mutation on a case material or artifact object.

target_object_type.description: Object type of the target being mutated. Must match a registered type in CaseWorkspace material_index or artifact_index.

target_object_id.description: object_id of the target object being mutated.

field_path.description: Dot-notation path to the mutated field within the target object (e.g. 'amount', 'body', 'evidence_citations.0').

old_value.description: Original field value before this change. null is permitted for fields being set for the first time.

new_value.description: Replacement field value injected by the scenario. null is permitted to represent field removal.

diff_entry.description: A per-issue summary of how the scenario's change_set affected that issue's analysis.

issue_id.description: object_id of the Issue whose analysis was affected.

impact_description.description: Human-readable explanation of how the change affected this issue. Must be traceable to at least one change_item in the change_set.

direction.description: Net directional effect on the issue's legal position: 'strengthen' improves the party's position, 'weaken' damages it, 'neutral' records a material change with no net directional effect.

description: Scenario captures a counterfactual injection into a baseline Run. The change_set records every field mutation applied before re-execution; the diff_summary records the per-issue impact produced after the output Run is compared to the baseline. A Scenario with an empty change_set and diff_summary='baseline' is the canonical baseline anchor.
